name: io.github.rafavecchi/grantd
description: Grantd MCP server: let your AI agent act on a user's behalf across third-party APIs via OAuth.

environmentVariables.name: GRANTD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: A Grantd secret key (sk_...). Treat it like a password.

environmentVariables.name: GRANTD_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Grantd broker (default http://localhost:8787).

environmentVariables.name: GRANTD_END_USER
environmentVariables.description: Default end-user id so tools don't need it passed each call.
